else if j<16562788-(-41478)then j=357864+1910725 s=-171611+171611 V=#v u=V==s else a=-5610+5610 T=H(572167+-528674)j=k[T]l=q[F[-138737+138745]]T=j(l,a)j=-857285+9487284 end end end end end end end j=#y return N(C)end,function(k,H)local N=a(H)local o=function(...)return j(k,{...},H,N)end return o end return(W(9059768-(-741188),{}))(N(C))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[H(-677797+721279)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
